Dubai International Chamber opens a new representative office in Luanda, the capital of Angola, to support the growth of trade and investment between Dubai and Angola. The inauguration comes during a period of significant growth in bilateral trade relations. The value of non-oil trade between Dubai and Angola reaches AED 11.6 billion in 2025, marking an increase of 47.5% compared to 2024. By the end of March 2026, a total of 87 Angolan companies are registered as active members of Dubai Chamber of Commerce.
